LanguageData.WULA_Addons_Antenna_Hediff_Base.label: Mechanical Command Node
LanguageData.WULA_Addons_Antenna_Hediff_Base.descript: Wula Empire synths have a pair of antennas on their heads. They can use this communication system to contact the Wula Empire fleet. Additionally, they can also use this system to send and receive secondary mechanoid signals—although most of the time, they lack the bandwidth to command mechanoids.
A pair of antennas capable of fleet communication.
LanguageData.WULA_Addons_Antenna_Hediff_Base.comps.He: Switch between artillery and aircraft call frequencies to request different types of support
View detailed information about the current frequency
LanguageData.Wula_FM_Switc_None.label: Frequency (None)
LanguageData.Wula_FM_Switc_None.description: Turn off all frequencies to avoid cluttering the skill bar.
LanguageData.Wula_FM_Switc_Artillery.label: Frequency (Artillery)
LanguageData.Wula_FM_Switc_Artillery.description: Allows Wula Empire synths to call for orbital artillery strikes, including a range of bombing capabilities with poor accuracy but wide coverage. Generally requires attack-type ships to be deployed in orbit to activate.
LanguageData.Wula_FM_Switc_Aircraft.label: Frequency (Aircraft)
LanguageData.Wula_FM_Switc_Aircraft.description: Allows Wula Empire synths to call for air support, including a range of precise and rapid close air support. Each aircraft independently calculates raid cooldown. Generally requires attack-type ships to be deployed in orbit to activate.
